title: Moving Empty Column from One Board to Another

posts.author: amiraenergyedc (Amira R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to have a status column filled in with all its possible answers but blank in terms of cells filled in, be duplicated and moved to another board?
!

When moving items from one board to another, both colors AND text need to be exactly the same, we are building a CRM with some status’s with extensive options its been quite daunting to not only match the text ( totally makes sense) but also match the colors!

Screenshots here with an example of our list of states from 2 different boards
Screen Shot 2023-06-28 at 10.55.21 AM|690x280

Screen Shot 2023-06-28 at 10.55.00 AM|690x330

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Amira!

Can you confirm if column templates is essentially what you’re looking for? Essentially, duplicate the status column across boards, without the associated item/column data?

posts.author: amiraenergyedc (Amira R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Ahh, yes! It is! We don’t have the Enterprise level of account though unfortunately. Can I make a suggestion that it becomes available to Premium accounts as well? There is quite a big price difference between the two and the premium account makes the most sense for our small business but being able to make column templates would save us a ton of time!

Thanks,

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: We hear you Amira and will do our best in advocating for this Please add your vote to the existing feature request to put greater emphasis on this need! Feel free to the share the thread and upvote any other feature requests you want to see brought to life.
